parameters.content:
## Approve / deny callback (hardened)
Invoked (POST) by the approve/deny action from the events workflow / a Slack button / a confirm page.

Guards (in `Validate & authorize`):
- shared **token** must equal `HIVEPILOT_APPROVE_SECRET`
- `run_id` must match `^[0-9]+$` (no path injection)
- `action` must be exactly `approve` or `deny`

Then → `POST {HIVEPILOT_API_URL}/approvals/{run_id}` `{ "action": … }`.

Env: `HIVEPILOT_API_URL`, `HIVEPILOT_API_TOKEN`, `HIVEPILOT_APPROVE_SECRET`.
POST (not GET) so link prefetch can't trigger the action. For per-link binding,
replace the shared token with an HMAC(secret, run_id|action|exp).
